verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a deep settled peace in my soul. It's an anchor that ever will hold, When the rough angry waves round me roll, There's a deep settled peace in my soul.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's a pure perfect love in my life. Does away with all envy and strife, Making me His obedient wife. There's a pure perfect love in my life.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's a rapturing faith in my heart, Breaks the bonds of this vain world apart, Lets me know I was His from the start. There's a rapturing faith in my heart.
